name: c-level-skills
description: Complete virtual board of directors: 10 C-level advisory roles, 6 orchestration skills, 6 cross-cutting capabilities, and 6 culture & collaboration frameworks. Features internal quality loop (self-verify → peer-verify → critic pre-screen), two-layer memory, board meeting protocol with Phase 2 isolation, proactive triggers, and structured user communication standard.

skills.name: CEO Advisor
skills.description: Strategic planning, business model, stakeholder management. Reasoning: Tree of Thought.

skills.name: CTO Advisor
skills.description: Technical leadership, architecture decisions, engineering strategy. Reasoning: ReAct.

skills.name: COO Advisor
skills.description: Operations leadership, process design, OKR execution. Reasoning: Step by Step.

skills.name: CPO Advisor
skills.description: Product vision, portfolio strategy, product-market fit. Reasoning: First Principles.

skills.name: CMO Advisor
skills.description: Brand strategy, growth models, marketing budget allocation. Reasoning: Recursion of Thought.

skills.name: CFO Advisor
skills.description: Financial leadership, fundraising, unit economics, cash management. Reasoning: Chain of Thought.

skills.name: CRO Advisor
skills.description: Revenue leadership, sales strategy, pricing, net revenue retention. Reasoning: Chain of Thought.

skills.name: CISO Advisor
skills.description: Security leadership, risk quantification, compliance roadmaps. Reasoning: Risk-Based.

skills.name: CHRO Advisor
skills.description: People leadership, hiring plans, compensation, org design. Reasoning: Empathy + Data.

skills.name: Executive Mentor
skills.description: Adversarial executive coach with /em: slash commands. Reasoning: Adversarial.

skills.name: C-Suite Onboard
skills.description: Founder interview → company-context.md that all agents read.

skills.name: Chief of Staff
skills.description: Central router — routes questions to the right role, triggers board meetings.

skills.name: Board Meeting
skills.description: 6-phase multi-agent deliberation with Phase 2 isolation.

skills.name: Decision Logger
skills.description: Two-layer memory: raw transcripts + approved decisions only.

skills.name: Agent Protocol
skills.description: Inter-agent invocation, loop prevention, quality loop, communication standard.

skills.name: Context Engine
skills.description: Company context loading and stage-adaptive configuration.

skills.name: Board Deck Builder
skills.description: Assembles board and investor update presentations.

skills.name: Scenario War Room
skills.description: Multi-variable what-if modeling for strategic scenarios.

skills.name: Competitive Intel
skills.description: Systematic competitor tracking and market intelligence.

skills.name: Org Health Diagnostic
skills.description: Cross-functional organizational health scoring.

skills.name: M&A Playbook
skills.description: Due diligence, integration planning for acquisitions.

skills.name: International Expansion
skills.description: Market entry strategy, regional playbooks, localization.

skills.name: Culture Architect
skills.description: Build and operationalize company culture systematically.

skills.name: Company OS
skills.description: EOS/Scaling Up operating system implementation.

skills.name: Founder Coach
skills.description: Founder personal development and leadership growth.

skills.name: Strategic Alignment
skills.description: Strategy cascade, silo detection, cross-functional alignment.

skills.name: Change Management
skills.description: ADKAR-based change rollout and transformation planning.

skills.name: Internal Narrative
skills.description: One consistent story across all audiences and channels.
